description: A designed 'WANTED' bounty/rogues-gallery card from ICE. The top fifth of the image is a bold red banner with the word 'WANTED' in large white all-caps sans-serif type. Below, against a near-black textured background, sits a centered photograph styled as an instant-print/Polaroid with a white border and subtle drop shadow. The photo is a frontal mugshot-style portrait of a young man (Ivan Archivaldo Guzman Salazar, a Sinaloa Cartel 'Chapitos' leader) with short dark hair, wearing a dark jacket over an open-collared white shirt, photographed against a marked institutional wall. Beneath the photo, in dark serif/condensed caps on the white card, is the caption: 'SINALOA CARTEL LEADER / CONSPIRACY TO DISTRIBUTE A CONTROLLED SUBSTANCE, RUNNING A CONTINUING CRIMINAL ENTERPRISE & MONEY LAUNDERING.' At the bottom, white text reads 'SEND TIPS TO' above a large '866-DHS-2-ICE' tip-line number, a short red divider rule, and the official ICE seal/wordmark logo. The visual style mimics a classic law-enforcement wanted poster updated with modern flat graphic design (red/black/white palette, high contrast). The messaging technique frames a named cartel fugitive as 'WANTED,' couples the tweet's $10M reward with a call-to-action tip line, and is intended to crowdsource leads and project ICE's pursuit of high-profile transnational criminals to a general public audience.
notable_text: WANTED | SINALOA CARTEL LEADER | CONSPIRACY TO DISTRIBUTE A CONTROLLED SUBSTANCE, RUNNING A CONTINUING CRIMINAL ENTERPRISE & MONEY LAUNDERING | SEND TIPS TO 866-DHS-2-ICE | ICE
